perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue low-cut dress, holds a colorful paper lantern with a Superman graphic on a bamboo stick. She looks directly at the camera with a playful, pouting expression while speaking. (2) She continues to hold the lantern and looks down briefly before returning her gaze to the camera, maintaining a friendly and slightly humorous facial expression. (3) The scene remains static with her holding the lantern in the center of the frame against a dark, nighttime outdoor background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice is heard speaking in a soft, playful, and slightly high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) There is no background music or significant ambient noise detected, creating a clean vocal-focused audio track. (3) Minimal rustling sounds are heard as the subject moves slightly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "這個中秋" (This Mid-Autumn Festival): Functional text appearing at the bottom of the screen, establishing the context of the video. (2) "吃太胖了😭" (Ate too much and got fat😭): Decorative/Hook text with an emoji, conveying a playful and self-deprecating tone about festive overeating.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The subject stands still and talks directly to the camera while holding a festive lantern.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character visible in a medium-close up shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long dark hair, wearing a light blue dress and a delicate necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A dark outdoor environment at night with some blurred vegetation and a distant structure visible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a lighthearted personal moment during the Mid-Autumn Festival, using the lantern as a prop to discuss the common theme of festive weight gain in a humorous way for social media engagement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct eye contact and playful pouting toward the camera.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a traditional festive element (the lantern) combined with a relatable modern concern (weight gain) to create quick, relatable content.
